channel.title: Flower on Plant IDEA Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Flower on Plant IDEA Lab

item.title: Congrats to Yi and others!
item.description:
YangJin, L., Yuan, Y., Zeng, S., Hu, G., Du, M., Xiong, H., Jia, X., & Duan, R. (2026). Adaptive genome evolution and metabolic rewiring in the highland poppy Meconopsis integrifolia. Horticulture Research, uhag045. https://doi.org/10.1093/hr/uhag045

Title: Adaptive genome evolution and metabolic rewiring in the highland poppy Meconopsis integrifolia

Authors: Lamu YangJin, Yi Yuan, Siheng Zeng, Guojin Hu, Mingyang Du, Huiyan Xiong, Xianqing Jia, Ruijun Duan

Abstract:

News:

Assessment of M. integrifolia genome assembly, annotation, analysis of petal metabolites, and evolution of morphine and noscapine biosynthesis.
